title: Ancient tools created by modern man:
description: WHEATLAND - The Platte County Historical Society will host Curt Artery at 7 p.m. Tuesday, March 31st at the Platte County Library. For years, Artery has been recreating stone tools and ...

title: Inside Varanasi sets where SS Rajamouli has recreated Kashi: How India's biggest film rebuilt ancient temples, ghats
description: The makers of SS Rajamouli's Varanasi have shared a first look inside the secretive sets of the Mahesh Babu and Priyanka Chopra-starrer.

title: Have fossil fuel lobbyists captured the European Parliament?
description: Over the course of four months, while Members of the European Parliament (MEPs) were debating the “Omnibus law,” 22,158 lobbyists entered the European Parliament. An analysis of exclusive data detailing their presence during this politically charged period clearly highlights the weight of economic and financial interests, many of them from the United States. This [...] The article Have fossil fuel lobbyists captured the European Parliament? first appeared on Reclaim Finance .

title: Aussie council pushes for ‘fossil fuel’ tax
description: A country council hit hard by natural disasters is calling for a national tax on major polluting companies to pay for drought, fire and flood recovery.

title: Fort Collins baseball makes statement, run-rules rival Fossil Ridge
